chunks.title: Introduction of the Two Sisters
chunks.reason: Sets up the allegory by introducing Oholah and Oholibah as Samaria and Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Judgment on Oholah (Samaria)
chunks.reason: Describes Oholah's lust for Assyria and her subsequent punishment.

chunks.title: Judgment on Oholibah (Jerusalem)
chunks.reason: Details Oholibah's corruption with Babylon and her memory of Egypt.

chunks.title: The Cup of Horror
chunks.reason: Yahweh declares the specific judgment and the cup Oholibah must drink.

chunks.title: Abominations and Final Verdict
chunks.reason: Summarizes their sins including idolatry and temple profanation before the final execution.
